chunks.title: Moses Sees the Promised Land
chunks.reason: Describes Moses viewing the land and God's declaration that he will not enter it.

chunks.title: Death and Burial of Moses
chunks.reason: Narrates the death, burial, age, and mourning period for Moses.

chunks.title: Succession of Joshua and Praise of Moses
chunks.reason: Details Joshua's appointment and concludes with a summary of Moses' unique prophetic status.
